disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two weeks of a spreading, painful, blistering, crusting and peeling rash concentrated around the mouth, groin and lower legs, much worse tonight
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the rash and where it is?
What is your skin doing now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's red and really painful, it blisters then crusts and the skin peels off. It's worst around my mouth, in my groin and on my lower legs, and it's been spreading and getting worse over about two weeks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful mouth and tongue with cracked lip corners, severely limiting oral intake (mucosal involvement)
trigger_question_examples: Is your mouth or tongue affected?
Can you eat and drink normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My tongue is red, smooth and really sore and the corners of my mouth are cracked. It burns so much that I can't eat or drink properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional 15 kg weight loss over three months with profound weakness and low mood
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight recently?
How have you been feeling in yourself over the last few months?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost about 15 kg over the last three months without trying, and I feel really weak, exhausted and down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic watery diarrhoea for roughly three months
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've had watery diarrhoea for months now — it just won't settle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently diagnosed high blood sugar, started on glucose-lowering tablets by the GP (patient-known baseline)
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any new medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My GP told me a couple of months ago that my blood sugar was high and started me on some tablets for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to maintain oral hydration and nutrition; bedbound due to pain and weakness; sibling cannot manage care
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep fluids down?
Can you get out of bed and look after yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't really eat or drink because my mouth is so raw, and I'm too weak and sore to get out of bed. My sibling is here but can't manage the wounds or keep me going.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new antibiotics, allopurinol or other new medications started before the rash began (pertinent negative for a classic drug trigger)
trigger_question_examples: Did you start any new medicines, antibiotics or supplements just before the rash?
Any new tablets in the last few weeks apart from the diabetes ones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't started any new antibiotics or anything like allopurinol — just the diabetes tablets a couple of months ago, before the rash.
